sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, date_col DATE, str_col VARCHAR(255), num_col FLOAT, interval_col INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, '2023-04-12', 'test', 500.5, interval '1-1' year to month), (2, NULL, 'example', 100.1, interval '0-5' year to month);
SELECT listagg(CASE WHEN date_col IS NOT NULL THEN str_col ELSE 'NULL' END, ', ') AS aggregated_string FROM test_table GROUP BY date_col;
SELECT listagg(date_col::text || ' - ' || num_col::text, ' | ') AS combined FROM test_table WHERE num_col > 100.0 GROUP BY interval_col;
SELECT t1.id, listagg(t2.str_col, ' | ') FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.num_col >= 50.0 GROUP BY t1.id HAVING COUNT(t2.id) > 1;
SELECT listagg(str_col, ', ') FROM (SELECT id, str_col, interval_col FROM test_table WHERE interval_col = interval '0-5' year to month) AS derived_table;
SELECT listagg(CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR), ', ') AS null_agg FROM test_table;
SELECT listagg(num_col::text, ' | ') FROM (SELECT id, num_col FROM test_table WHERE str_col = '') AS empty_string_case GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE additional_table (key_col INT, join_col VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL, interval_overlap INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO additional_table VALUES (1, 'join_test', interval '1-3' year to month), (2, 'null_join', NULL);

SELECT listagg(a.join_col || ' (' || to_char(interval '1-3' year to month, 'YY-MM') || ')', '; ') FROM additional_table a LEFT JOIN test_table b ON a.key_col = b.id WHERE b.str_col IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.key_col HAVING COUNT(b.id) > 0;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table (temp_id INT, temp_number FLOAT, temp_string VARCHAR(100));
SELECT listagg(COALESCE(temp_string, 'EMPTY'), ', ') AS coalesced_output FROM temp_table WHERE temp_number IS NULL;
SELECT listagg(num_col::text, '|') AS number_concats FROM test_table WHERE num_col < 0; SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE date_col IS NULL;
